boat.construction_details: Honduras Mahogany Planking, splined seams, on Canadian Rock Elm Timbers
boat.full_description: A Storr Tumlaren which means a large dolphin. Knud Reimer designed her and Adlard Coles drew attention to her with his sister ship "Cohoe" of which he was full of praise.
boat.name: Josephine of Hoo
boat.short_description: A Boat with a Pedigree and a sheer joy to sail. Bruce Grant bought her in 1985 and brought her up from Chichester to Northumberland. Since then the North Sea has been her playground : between St Kilda The Faroes Norway and Holland and Chichester. And gosh she has been fun.
